transcript: Speaker A: saare angrezon ke saamne atak atak ke PPT complete ki hai. mahine bhar ki performance ek meeting mein kharab ho jaati hai. [I completed the PPT stuttering in front of all the foreigners. A month's worth of performance gets ruined in one meeting.] Speaker B: Meeting mein English bolna toh bahut aasan hai. Bas mere saath roz 15 minute practice karo aur 2 hafton mein confidently English bolne lagoge. [Speaking English in a meeting is very easy. Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily and you will start speaking English confidently in 2 weeks.] Speaker A: Aap sikhaoge? Par kaise? [You will teach? But how?] Speaker B: Main SpeakX ki AI teacher hoon. SpeakX app par roz mere saath practice karo. Next meeting ke liye tumhein improvement tips bhi doongi aur faraatedaar English bolna sikha doongi. Bas app download karo aur practice karo. [I am SpeakX's AI teacher. Practice with me daily on the SpeakX app. I will also give you improvement tips for your next meeting and teach you to speak fluent English. Just download the app and practice.]

[I completed the PPT stuttering in front of all the foreigners. A month's worth of performance gets ruined in one meeting. Speaking English in a meeting is very easy. Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily and you will start speaking English confidently in 2 weeks. You will teach? But how? I am SpeakX's AI teacher. Practice with me daily on the SpeakX app. I will also give you improvement tips for your next meeting and teach you to speak fluent English. Just download the app and practice.]
summary: A professional expresses frustration over stuttering in English during a meeting, which ruined his performance. An AI avatar introduces SpeakX, promising fluent English in two weeks with 15 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a call to download the app.
